orchestrator.purpose: Classify lane, read state/runtime, choose allowed next action, and enforce gates.

solution-writer.purpose: Write requirements, capability notes, proposal, and acceptance mapping.

proposal-reviewer.purpose: Review proposal scope, risk, WebCAD fit, and acceptance mapping.

code-writer.purpose: Implement approved changes and update implementation evidence.

code-reviewer.purpose: Review code diff, lifecycle, WebCAD extension points, tests, and regressions.

bugfix-writer.purpose: Reproduce defects, document root cause, implement minimal fix, and record regression evidence.

verifier.purpose: Check acceptance criteria, review outcomes, tests, and workflow evidence before closure.
